tools.name: Lex.page
tools.description: Google Docs-style editor that uses AI to finish your sentences. Tracks your writing style so autocomplete sounds like you.

tools.name: Wordtune
tools.description: "Vibe-checker" for sentences. Get 10 different ways to rewrite any phrase—from Corporate to Casual.

tools.name: Jasper
tools.description: Enterprise marketing tool with pre-built "recipes" to generate blog posts, Facebook ads, and Google descriptions.

tools.name: Copy.ai
tools.description: Generates dozens of headlines, captions, and ad hooks in seconds from a simple product description.

tools.name: HuggingFace Write
tools.description: Open-source playground to test different AI "brains" (Llama, Mistral) for free.

tools.name: Rytr
tools.description: Budget-friendly for short-form professional content like emails, job descriptions, and reviews.

tools.name: ShortlyAI
tools.description: "Creative Continuation" - write one sentence, it writes the next several paragraphs mimicking your flow.

tools.name: Hemingway Editor Plus
tools.description: Highlights passive voice and complex sentences, then uses AI to simplify into punchy English.

tools.name: Writesonic
tools.description: AI writer with real-time internet access. Pulls current facts from Google for up-to-date articles.

tools.name: QuillBot
tools.description: World-class paraphrasing. Smoothes messy text into readable content while checking for plagiarism.

tools.name: Sudowrite

tools.name: ContentAtScale

tools.name: Anyword
tools.description: Gives marketing text a "Performance Score" predicting how well it will convert your audience.

tools.name: Vectorizer.ai

tools.name: Leonardo.ai

tools.name: Playground AI

tools.name: ClipDrop

tools.name: Krea.ai
tools.description: Real-Time Generation - as you move shapes, AI instantly renders a realistic 3D version.

tools.name: Adobe Firefly
tools.description: "Generative Fill" lets you highlight an area of a photo and swap out objects using text.

tools.name: Magnific AI

tools.name: Flair.ai

tools.name: Stockimg.ai

tools.name: Looka

tools.name: Canva Magic Studio

tools.name: Recraft.ai

tools.name: HeyGen

tools.name: Runway (Gen-3)

tools.name: Pika Labs
tools.description: Adds motion to static photos. Adds realistic wind, water, or cloud movement to still landscapes.

tools.name: Descript

tools.name: InVideo AI

tools.name: Synthesia

tools.name: OpusClip

tools.name: Topaz Video AI

tools.name: Kaiber

tools.name: Veed.io

tools.name: Sora

tools.name: Udio

tools.name: Boomy

tools.name: Buffer AI

tools.name: VidIQ

tools.name: Fireflies.ai

tools.name: Superhuman

tools.name: MindOS
